Pomodoros.io — Free Multi Timer to Boost Desktop Productivity

Pomodoros.io is a free multi timer designed to help you boost desktop productivity and learn to focus while working on desktop. Run up to 4 independent Pomodoro timers simultaneously, use our built-in desktop stopwatch with lap tracking, and play ambient noise to stay in flow. No signup required.

  • Free multi timer — up to 4 simultaneous Pomodoro timers
  • Desktop stopwatch with lap tracking
  • Ambient noise: white, pink, and brown noise
  • Live focus stats, task breakdown, and CSV export
  • Color wash fullscreen focus mode
  • Works on any device — no download or signup needed
